items.name_cn:
『Balenciaga lique』
Hourglass Crocodile Green Small
Balenciaga's seasonal heavyweight Hourglass crocodile bag features a unique, iconic curved silhouette that stands out instantly. The smooth surface forms a crescent shape with a metal B-shaped pull ring. The calfskin texture is exquisite and full of character! Go for it, don't stop!! 🖤🖤🖤
Small size: 19x8x21cm

items.name_cn:
『Balenciaga Balenciaga』
BALENCIAG* New Gossip bag Crossbody! Plain Weave
Freshly released the cool Gossip mini bag, featuring a front BB logo design paired with vintage hardware. The real thing exudes a premium feel, cool and chic, suitable for daily wear, blending style and casual vibes!
Must-have new favorite~🤩
Small: 19x10x6.9cm Style: 9522
